sections.sectionTitle: Jefthah in Ammon mite panin Israel Honkhia

verses.text: Tu-in Gilead khuami Jefthah, a thahat galhang khat hi a, ahih hangin amah pen zawlta ahi hi. Jefthah' pa Gilead hi a

Gilead' zi in zong amah tawh tapa dang nei hi. A tapate a khan' ciangun amaute in Jefthah notkhia-in ama kiangah, “Ka pa uh inn sungah gamh na luah kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen numei dang tawh zawlta na hi lel hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin a sanggamte kiang panin Jefthah tai-in Tob gamsungah teng a, bangmah a manlo mite in Jefthah pawmin amah tawh mite sugawpin pai kawikawi uh hi
Tawlkhat khit ciangin Ammon mite in Israel-te sim uh hi
Ammon mite in Israel-te a sim ciangin Tob gam panin Jefthah a la dingin Gilead upate va pai uh hi
Amaute in Jefthah kiangah, “Ammon mite i do theihna dingin hong pai in la kote' makai hong hi in,” va ci uh hi

Ahih hangin Jefthah in Gilead upate kiangah, “Note in kei hong mudahin ka pa' inn pan hong hawlkhia hilo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin thuhaksa na tuah uh ciangin kei kiangah hong pai na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi

Tua ciangin Gilead upate in Jefthah kiangah, “Kote tawh nang hong pai-in Ammon mite do-in Gilead gamsunga teng mi khempeuh tungah lutang nong hih theihna dingin nang' lamah hong kihei ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Jefthah in Gilead upate kiangah, “Note in Ammon mite a do dingin inn-ah kei nong ciahpih uh a, kei tungah Topa in amaute hong piak leh kei pen note' lutang ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Gilead upate in Jefthah kiangah, “ Topa pen eite' kikalah teci hi ding hi. Na cih bangin ka gamta ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gilead upate tawh Jefthah pai a, mite in amau' tungah lutang leh makai-in amah koih uh hi. Jefthah hih hih thute khempeuh Mizpah khuasung Topa' mai-ah a gen ahi hi
Tua ciangin Jefthah in Ammon mite' kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Ka gam a sim dingin kei kiangah nong paina dingin kei' tungah bang thu om ahi hiam?” cisak hi

Ammon mite' kumpipa in Jefthah' kamtaite dawng a, “Egypt panin Israel-te hong pai lai-in Arnon panin Jabbok leh Jordan ciang ka gam hong laksak hang ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in thudamin hong piakik in,” a ci hi
Jefthah in Ammon mite' kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawlkikin
ama kiangah, “Jefthah in hih bangin ci hi: Israel-te in Moab leitang hita leh Ammon mite' leitang hita leh lalo hi
Egypt panin Israel-te hong paitoh lai-in gamlak tawnin San Tuipi-ah hong pai-in Kadesh hong tung uh hi

Israel-te in Edom kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawl a, ‘Kong thum uh hi; na gamsung hong nawksak in,’ cisak uh hi. Ahih hangin Edom kumpipa in a thu ngailo hi. Tua ciangin Moab kumpipa kiangah zong sawl uh a, ahih hangin amah thukimlo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kadesh-ah Israel-te om phot uh hi

Tua ciangin sehnel gam tawnin amaute khualzin uh a, Edom gam leh Moab gam kimkotin pai-in Moab gam nisuahna lampangah tung uh a, Arnon gun galkhatah phual sat uh hi. Ahih hangin Moab gam sungah amaute lutlo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Arnon gun pen Moab gamgi ahi hi
Tua ciangin Israel-te in Heshbon khua-ah a om Amor mite' kumpi Sihon kiangah kamtaite sawl uh hi. Israel-te in ama kiangah, ‘Kong thum uh hi; ka gam uh a zuan dingin na gam hong nawksak in,’ ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Sihon in ama gam a nawk dingin Israel-te muanglo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Sihon in a mite khempeuh kaikhawmin Jahaz-ah giahphual sat a, Israel-te na sim hi
Topa, Israel-te' Pasian in Sihon leh a mite khempeuh Israel-te' khutsungah pia a, amaute in zo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua gamsunga teng Amor mite' leitang khempeuh Israel-te in luah uh hi
Amaute in Arnon gun panin Jabbok lui ciang leh sehnel gam panin Jordan gun ciang, Amor mite' gam khempeuh a luah uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Israel-te' Pasian in ama mi Israel-te' mai panin Amor mite paaikhia hi. Tu-in nangmah in luahkik ding sawm na hi hiam
Na pasian Khemosh in na neih dinga hong piakte kem peuh in. Kote ahih leh Topa ka Pasian un kote' mai-ah a suankhiatte ka tang ding uh hi
Tu-in nang pen Moab kumpipa, Zippor' tapa Balak sangin ginazaw na hi hiam? Amah in Israel-te to ngei a, amaute do ngei ahi hiam
Heshbon leh a khuaneute, Aroer leh a khuaneute, leh Arnon gun panga om khuapite khempeuh sungah Israel-te a ten' kum za thum hun sung tengin bang hangin lakik lo na hi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin nang tungah ka khial kei a, kei nong simna-ah kei tungah nang nong khial hi. Topa, Thukhenpa in Israel mite leh Ammon mite kikalah tuni-in thu khen ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Ammon kumpipa in ama kiangah thu a puak Jefthah' thu a don kei hi
Tua ciangin Jefthah' tungah Topa' kha hong tung a, amah in Gilead leh Manasseh nawkin Gilead gam Mizpah-ah paisuak a, Gilead gam Mizpah panin Ammon mite kiangah paisuak lai hi
Jefthah in Topa tungah thuciamna bawlin, “Ka khutsungah Ammon mite nong piak leh
Ammon mite kiang panin gualzo-in ka ciah ciangin keimah a dawn dingin ka innsung pan a hong pai peuhpeuh Topa-a' hi ding a, meihal biakna dingin kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute a sim dingin Ammon mite kiangah Jefthah galkah a, Topa in ama khutsungah amaute a pia hi
Amah in Aroer panin Minnith kiimnai ciangdong khuapi sawmnih, leh Abelkeramim ciangdong mi tampi tak thatin a vatgawp hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite mai-ah Ammon mite guallel uh hi.

Tua ciangin Mizpah-a ama inn-ah Jefthah hong ciah hi. Amah a dawn dingin a tanu khuangneute tawh a laamsa-in hong paikhia hi. Tuanu pen ama ta khat neihsun hi a, amah simloh tapa ahi a, tanu ahi zongin adang neilo hi

Amah in a tanu a muh ciangin a puan balkekin, “Ala, ka tanu! Kei nong niamkoih mahmah hi. Kei-a' dingin lungkhamna lianpi nong suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa tungah thu ka ciam khin a, ka thuciamna ka dokkik thei kei hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin a tanu in ama kiangah, “Ka pa aw, Topa tungah thu ciam khin na hih leh, na thuciamna tawh kizui-in kei' tungah hong bawl in. Tu-in Topa in na gal Ammon mite tungah nang-a' ding hong thuksak khin hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in a pa kiangah, “Kong ngetnop thu khat om hi. Kei pai-in mualtungah vak kawikawi-in kei leh ka lawmte in nungakin ka sihna ding hangin ka thum theihna dingun kha nih sung kei guak hong omsak in,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Pai ta in,” a ci hi. Amah in kha nih sung a tanu paikhia sak hi. Tua ciangin amah leh a lawmte paikhia-in nungakin a sihna ding hangin mualte tungah kapin a thum uh hi

Kha nih a cin' ciangin a pa kiangah amah ciahkik a, amah in ama bawlsa a thuciamna bangin a tanu tungah hih hi. Tuanu pen pasal tawh a lumkhawm nailo, nungakin khan'sih hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te sungah ngeina khat suak a
Israel numeite kum khatin ni li sung kum simin Gilead mi Jefthah' tanu hangin a thum dingin paikhia uh hi.
